P

pause() - Methode in Klasse at.ofai.music.wgworm.PlayControl
 
PAUSED - Statische Variable in Klasse at.ofai.music.wgworm.PlayControl
 
play() - Methode in Klasse at.ofai.music.wgworm.PlayControl
 
PlayControl - Klasse in at.ofai.music.wgworm
A JPanel with a Play/Pause button, a Stop button, and a JSlider.
PlayControl() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.ofai.music.wgworm.PlayControl
Constructor without passing a player.
PlayControl(MyPlayer) - Konstruktor für Klasse at.ofai.music.wgworm.PlayControl
 
PlayControl(MyPlayer, int) - Konstruktor für Klasse at.ofai.music.wgworm.PlayControl
 
PlayControl(MyPlayer, int, int) - Konstruktor für Klasse at.ofai.music.wgworm.PlayControl
Creates a play control with PLAY/PAUSE and STOP buttons as well as a slider to navigate within a media file.
PLAYING - Statische Variable in Klasse at.ofai.music.wgworm.PlayControl
 
playSetPause() - Methode in Klasse at.ofai.music.wgworm.PlayControl
Sets the play button to pause state (and displays a PAUSE icon)
playSetPlay() - Methode in Klasse at.ofai.music.wgworm.PlayControl
Sets the play button to play state (and displays a PLAY icon)
